properties.name: Enter credentials
properties.description: User enters email and password into login form

properties.name: Submit form
properties.description: User clicks Login button, form sends POST /api/auth/login

properties.name: Validate credentials
properties.description: Server verifies email exists and password matches bcrypt hash (cost 12)

properties.name: Save refresh token
properties.description: Server stores refresh_token hash in RefreshToken table

properties.name: Sync MM password
properties.description: Server updates Mattermost user password via MM API

properties.name: Set cookies
properties.description: Server sets access_token and refresh_token as httpOnly secure cookies

properties.name: Redirect
properties.description: Priority: must_change_password=true → redirect to /change-password; else if URL has sanitized ?from=<same-origin path> → redirect there; else redirect to /dashboard
